text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day at the sporting goods store...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, I would like some<n>assistance,
please. Could I get these,<n>these, and those as
well?

text_block_list.name: Shop Assistant
text_block_list.text:
Y-you want all of them?! I appreciate<n>the
patronage, but are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course. They are all wonderful<n>shoes that
exude the very souls of<n>their makers.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You there, were you not also drawn<n>here by
these captivating shoes?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I am, in fact, referring to you!<n>Now tell me, do
you not have the urge<n>to own every pair of these
beauties?
choice_data_list:
I don't think they'll all fit in your dorm's shoe
cabinet...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
My goodness, you are absolutely<n>right! Groove
reprimanded me the<n>other day for the very same
reason.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... While it pains me to do so, I<n>must
restrain myself and only buy a<n>single pair of
shoes.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
While I still have you here, what kind<n>of shoes do
you think would be the<n>best?
choice_data_list:
Ones that are lightweight so you can run fast in
them.
Ones that are heavy but will be great for training.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I concur. It is not every day I buy<n>new
shoes, and getting ones that<n>enable me to run
faster would be a<n>true delight.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Very well! Let us search for the<n>lightest shoes in
this store!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And once I have them purchased, I<n>challenge you
to a race! Hehe, I<n>believe this will make for a
lovely<n>memory. ♪
choice_data_list: I dunno about racing against an Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Now that is quite a shame. I thought it<n>would be
good fun...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah! These shoes look quite light<n>indeed!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As soon as she's paid for the shoes,<n>Fine
Motion puts them on and runs off<n>in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
How very intriguing. While heavy<n>shoes may be
difficult to run in, I<n>suppose they would be good
training<n>aids.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Those shoes over there might fit the<n>bill nicely.
Look, they're so big and<n>heavy, simply walking
in them would<n>be great fun!
choice_data_list:
I don't know if wearing them would be "fun," but
okay...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well, I have never worn such<n>cumbersome
shoes before, and<n>first-time experiences are
always so<n>refreshing and wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That settles it. Excuse me! I would<n>like those
shoes, please!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After purchasing her new shoes, Fine<n>Motion
puts them on and walks off.<n>Her gait may be
awkward, but her<n>smile shines far brighter.
